full_description: use the specified hand to pick up the block, inspect the hidden back color mark, and place it on the matching colored target area
schema: {A} denotes the back-color-marked block, {B} denotes the matching colored target area, and {C} denotes the specified hand. The instruction does not reveal the hidden back color or the distractor target color.
preference: Mention the specified hand and matching colored target area, but do not reveal which color is correct.
seen: Use {C} to inspect {A} and place it on {B}.
Use {C} to pick up {A}, check its hidden back color, and move it onto {B}.
With {C}, look at the back color of {A} and place it on the matching target area {B}.
Use {C} to inspect {A} and sort it to {B}.
Use {C} to rotate {A} briefly, identify its back color, and place it on {B}.
unseen: With {C}, check the hidden back color on {A} and place it onto {B}.
Use {C} to lift {A}, inspect its back marker, and set it on {B}.
Use {C} to examine the rear color of {A} before placing it on {B}.
With {C}, inspect {A} and move it to the correctly colored area {B}.
Use {C} to reveal the back color of {A} and then place it onto {B}.
